funFacts.title: About Kilobytes
funFacts.content: A kilobyte is 1,000 bytes — roughly enough to store a short paragraph of plain text.

funFacts.title: About Megabytes
funFacts.content: A megabyte is 1,000,000 bytes (decimal) or 1,048,576 bytes (binary/MiB) depending on the standard used.
